latin: Num hoc magis fastidiosum esse potest? Chandlerus semper sic loquebatur. omnia exaggerabat. num quis magis sarcasmo uti potest?

questions.prompt: What is Chandler's signature speech pattern?
questions.target: Exaggerating with 'Could this BE any more...'
choices: Exaggerating with 'Could this BE any more...'

questions.prompt: What does the speaker rely on heavily?

translation: Could this BE any more annoying? Chandler always spoke this way. He exaggerated everything. Could anyone use more sarcasm?
